# About this item

- Bosch style 12VDC (14V Max) 5-Pin SPDT (Single Pole Double Throw) relay with 40A/30A high switching capability.Interlocking design relay socket harness base for easy cable management & organization
- The relay sockets are pre-wired with 12" pigtail leads, which are long enough for your installation
- Wire Specifications: Black - Ground (85), Red - VDC (30), White - Trigger (86), Yellow - Output N/C (87a), and Blue - Output N/O (87)
- Relay harness sockets are made of 12AWG pure Oxygen Free Copper as conductor to ensure its excellent electrical conductivity.The Included ATC/ATO in-line fuse-holders protect circuits and electrical equipment
- Package Include: 2 x relays, 2 x relay sockets with wires, and 2 x in-line ATC fuseholders

- Bosch style 12VDC (14V Max) 5-Pin SPDT (Single Pole Double Throw) relay with 40A/30A high switching capability.Interlocking design relay socket harness base for easy cable management & organization
- The relay sockets are pre-wired with 12" pigtail leads, which are long enough for your installation
- Wire Specifications: Black - Ground (85), Red - VDC (30), White - Trigger (86), Yellow - Output N/C (87a), and Blue - Output N/O (87)
- Relay harness sockets are made of 12AWG pure Oxygen Free Copper as conductor to ensure its excellent electrical conductivity.The Included ATC/ATO in-line fuse-holders protect circuits and electrical equipment
- Package Include: 2 x relays, 2 x relay sockets with wires, and 2 x in-line ATC fuseholders
